description: You are a Clinical Data Manager. The study sponsor has unexpectedly terminated the 'Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry' (CV-REG-2023) due to loss of funding. Login to OpenClinica (username 'root', password 'Admin123!') and soft-delete the 'Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry' study so it no longer appears as active. Do not modify or remove the 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' or the 'Asthma Prevention Pilot' studies.
